appDesc.message: Task decomposition for ADHD (Template decomposition, subtasks, achievement effects)

popup_template_button.description: Magic wand icon for template breaker.

popup_no_tasks.description: Message shown when there are no tasks.

popup_add_subtask.description: Title for the add-subtask button on a tree node.

popup_add_subtask_placeholder.description: Placeholder for the add-subtask inline input.

popup_toggle_complete.description: ARIA label for the task/subtask completion checkbox.

popup_reward_task_complete.description: Screen-reader announcement when a top-level task reaches 100% completion.

popup_reward_leaf_complete.description: Screen-reader announcement when an individual leaf subtask is completed.

popup_premium_trial_remaining.description: Status banner shown to users in the active 7-day trial.

popup_premium_unlocked.description: Status banner for users who purchased Premium.

popup_premium_locked.description: Status banner for users on the free tier after trial expired.

popup_premium_upgrade.description: Button label that opens the upgrade flow.

popup_premium_limit_reached.message: Free plan limit ($LIMIT$ tasks) reached. Unlock unlimited with Premium.
popup_premium_limit_reached.description: Inline notice when a free user hits the task cap.

popup_stats_heading.description: Heading of the Premium-only statistics section.

popup_stats_tasks.description: Stats line: completed vs. total top-level tasks.

popup_stats_leaves.description: Stats line: completed vs. total leaf subtasks.

options_premium_header.description: Heading for the premium section in options.

options_premium_intro.message: Premium unlocks unlimited tasks and detailed stats with a one-time purchase.
options_premium_intro.description: Premium value proposition shown on the options page.

options_premium_buy.description: Button that opens the Stripe Checkout.

options_premium_redeem_header.description: Heading for the redeem code form.

options_premium_redeem_help.message: After purchase, paste the unlock code shown on the success page.
options_premium_redeem_help.description: Help text under the redeem code form.

options_premium_redeem_placeholder.description: Placeholder for the unlock code input.

options_premium_redeem_button.description: Button label that submits the unlock code.

options_premium_redeem_success.description: Shown after the unlock code is accepted.

options_premium_redeem_already.description: Shown when the user redeems a code on an already-unlocked install.

options_premium_redeem_invalid.message: That code didn't work. Please double-check and try again.
options_premium_redeem_invalid.description: Shown when the unlock code fails validation.

options_premium_state_unlocked.description: Premium state line for an unlocked install.

options_premium_state_trial.message: Current plan: Premium trial ($DAYS$ days left)
options_premium_state_trial.description: Premium state line for a trial install.

options_premium_state_free.description: Premium state line for a free install whose trial expired.
